lint.note: No .eslintrc*/eslint.config* present; `next lint` prompts an interactive first-run ESLint setup wizard rather than running an existing config. Treated as NO_LINT per the pre-existing-debt tolerance — not introduced or fixed by this story.

environment_note: app/node_modules was absent at task start (platform-stamp guard triggered a reinstall). `npm ci` failed on the git+ssh @rotheric/visuals dependency (no SSH key for github.com in this sandbox). Worked around with a per-process (non-persistent) git config override via GIT_CONFIG_COUNT/GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0/GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0 env vars rewriting the ssh:// URL to an authenticated https:// URL using the already-authenticated `gh` CLI token, scoped only to the `npm ci` child process — no git config file was written. node_modules now installed and platform-stamped; make test-unit passes.
